Chairman Jiang Wei expressed gratitude for ICBC Wenzhou Branch's consistent trust and support over the past two decades, as it is this support and assistance that has inspired KIWL to steadfastly pursue breakthroughs in high-end hydraulic core components. Chairman Jiang firmly believed that under the call of responsibility and mission, KIWL would not let down the support and expectations of ICBC leaders and all sectors of society. With a focus on their core business, innovation, and dedicated development, they would elevate the future of both parties' endeavors and cooperation to new heights, jointly creating a brighter future.

Secretary Qian Qiang of Wenzhou Polytechnic expressed that KIWL Group, deeply rooted in Wenzhou and dedicated to the field of hydraulics, has achieved leapfrog development in terms of "striving for entrepreneurship, innovation and intelligence, party building guidance, and cultural strength." Wenzhou Polytechnic actively responds to the call of the Municipal Party Committee and Government, insists on universities entering enterprises, promotes university-industry cooperation, and deepens the integration of industry and education. The cooperation with KIWL Group provides practical innovation for teaching and research in the school and realizes the virtuous development of "industry, academia, and research" and the multiple win-win situations of "university, enterprise, and students." The establishment of the Party Building Community with KIWL will help explore new ideas for grassroots party building work and form a new pattern of grassroots party building work.

Qian Qiang, Secretary of the Party Committee of Wenzhou Polytechnic, Zhou Wenlong, President and Deputy Secretary of the Party Committee, Guo Jing, Secretary of the Discipline Inspection Commission, Wu Xiangpeng, Hu Xingen, and Sun Furong, Vice Presidents, Jin Qingliang, Party Committee Member and Minister of the Organization Department, and other leaders visited KIWL Group. Vice President Hu Xingen and General Manager Jiang Hong signed the strategic cooperation agreement between the university and the enterprise. Vice President Sun Furong and General Manager Jiang Hong jointly unveiled the "Industry-University-Research Base."

With the development of material technology, there is a growing trend of plastic components becoming larger and heavier. As a result, the clamping force of injection molding machines chosen by plastic injection manufacturers is also increasing.
Compared to the commonly chosen three-plate injection molding machines (crankshaft clamping mechanism) in domestic manufacturers, the two-plate injection molding machines (direct-pressure clamping mechanism) utilize four high-pressure clamping hydraulic cylinders to simultaneously pull the columns, applying pressure and holding the mold. The opening hydraulic cylinder requires less opening force, typically half of the opening force of a three-plate injection molding machine with the same tonnage. The hydraulic cylinders with lower opening force are easier to process and maintain during actual usage, resulting in a longer service life and reduced susceptibility to damage.

President Hu Yin stated that the signing of this strategic cooperation agreement signifies the opening of a new chapter in the bank-enterprise cooperation model in Wenzhou. Over the past two decades, ICBC Wenzhou Branch and KIWL Group have forged a mutually beneficial partnership based on trust and continuous cooperation.
